subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 758659047/250115776 is not a GRB
body:
R. Hamburg (USRA) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 758659047/250115776 at 18:37:22.10 UT
on 15 January 2025, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB. This
trigger is likely due to local particles.
